name: agent-architect
description: Interactively designs and scaffolds a complete, best-in-class Claude Code plugin from a short interview: it quizzes you on what your agent should do, proposes a better structure (which parts should be a skill vs subagent vs command vs MCP), and generates the verified plugin. Use this whenever someone says 'build me an agent/plugin for X', 'help me design an agent', 'scaffold a Claude Code plugin', or wants to turn a workflow into a reusable agent.
